Car.MetaTag: Volkswagen CC 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Tech GT Euro 5 (s/s) 4dr Diesel Manual Grey
Car.Description: - Available now is this sleek and well-presented 2014 (64) Volkswagen CC 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Tech GT, a stylish executive coupe-saloon offering strong performance, excellent comfort, and impressive fuel economy. - Powered by the refined 2.0 TDI diesel engine, it delivers smooth power, strong torque, and great MPG — perfect for motorway driving, commuting, or anyone wanting executive comfort with sporty styling. - ✅ GT Spec • Executive Coupe Styling • Excellent MPG - Key Features Include: - • GT specification - • Leather interior - • Heated front seats - • Touchscreen infotainment system - • Satellite navigation - • Bluetooth and media connectivity - • Cruise control - • Dual-zone climate control - • Front and rear parking sensors - • Alloy wheels - • Multifunction steering wheel - • Electric windows and mirrors - • ISOFIX - • LED daytime running lights - Drives beautifully — smooth, refined, and comfortable. No warning lights or mechanical issues. - • Recently serviced and inspected - • MOT expires 03/11/2026 - ✅ Drive away today – reserve VN64 AOV with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply). - 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates. - ⸻ - Why Buy from AW Trade Centre? - We provide: - • Full mechanical inspection - • Free comprehensive warranty - • HPI clear vehicles (unless otherwise stated) - • Fresh valet inside and out - • Friendly, honest, and pressure-free service - 📞 Call or message us today to arrange a viewing or reserve this Volkswagen CC 2.0 TDI GT.

Car.MetaTag: Vauxhall Corsa 1.4i ecoTEC Limited Edition Euro 6 3dr Petrol Manual Brown
Car.Description: Available now is this sporty and well-presented 2015 (65) Vauxhall Corsa 1.4i ecoTEC Limited Edition, a stylish hatchback offering low running costs, great comfort, and eye-catching Limited Edition styling. Powered by the reliable 1.4 ecoTEC petrol engine, it’s smooth, economical, and ULEZ compliant, making it ideal for new drivers, commuting, or everyday driving. For added peace of mind, this vehicle will come with the timing chain replaced prior to sale. ✅ Limited Edition Styling • ULEZ Compliant • Timing Chain Replaced Key Features Include: • Limited Edition styling package • Alloy wheels • Cruise control • Bluetooth and media connectivity • Air conditioning • Touchscreen infotainment system • Multifunction steering wheel • Electric windows and mirrors • Sport seats • ISOFIX • Daytime running lights Drives great — smooth, responsive, and economical. No warning lights or mechanical issues. • Recently serviced and inspected • MOT to be renewed at point of sale ✅ Drive away today – reserve YC65 EWU with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply). 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates. ⸻ Why Buy from AW Trade Centre? We provide: • Full mechanical inspection • Free comprehensive warranty • HPI clear vehicles (unless otherwise stated) • Fresh valet inside and out • Friendly, honest, and pressure-free service 📞 Call or message us today to arrange a viewing or reserve this Vauxhall Corsa 1.4 ecoTEC Limited Edition.

Car.Description: ⚠️ SPARES OR REPAIRS / PART EXCHANGE TO CLEAR ⚠️ This vehicle has been taken in part exchange and is being listed as a trade sale due to its age and mileage. It is sold as seen, without warranty or guarantees. Buyers are welcome to inspect and test drive prior to purchase. ⸻ Available now is this 2010 (60) Audi A4 2.0 TDIe Technik, a premium saloon offering excellent fuel economy, refined comfort, and Audi’s renowned build quality. Powered by the efficient 2.0 TDIe diesel engine, it delivers strong MPG and smooth motorway cruising. ✅ £35 road tax • TDI Efficiency • Great MPG Key Features Include: • Technik specification • Satellite navigation system • Bluetooth and media connectivity • Cruise control • Dual-zone climate control • Alloy wheels • Multifunction steering wheel • Electric windows and mirrors • Full leather seats • Heated seats • Daytime running lights Starts and drives (unless you want to specify faults). • MOT status to be confirmed 💷 Priced to clear – no offers, no warranty. 🚗 Drive away today – first to view will buy. ⸻ 📞 Call or message to arrange viewing.

Car.MetaTag: Ford Fiesta 1.4 Titanium 5dr Petrol Automatic Red
Car.Description: Available now is this well-presented and highly sought-after 2009 Ford Fiesta 1.4 Titanium Automatic, a practical and reliable hatchback offering smooth driving, great comfort, and ease of use. Powered by the dependable 1.4 petrol engine paired with a fully automatic gearbox, this car is perfect for those wanting a stress-free driving experience — ideal for city driving, new drivers, or anyone specifically looking for an automatic. ✅ AUTOMATIC • Easy to drive • Low running costs Key Features Include: • Automatic transmission • Titanium specification • Alloy wheels • Air conditioning • Bluetooth and media connectivity • Heated front windscreen • Multifunction steering wheel • Electric windows and mirrors • Remote central locking • ISOFIX • Trip computer Drives great — smooth, comfortable, and effortless thanks to the automatic gearbox.
